title: Visual regression screenshot and interaction evidence gate
summary: Capture reviewer-inspectable responsive screenshots and automated evidence for player HUD, selection, camera and minimum playable chain after remediation.
acceptance: Captures required viewport screenshots or equivalent visual artifacts in zh-CN and en
Automated tests fail on major clipping, overlap, missing key player controls, selection failure, camera failure or command-chain failure
Artifacts distinguish default player HUD from explicit diagnostics overlay
Records residual visual-production needs separately from functional blocker status
Does not weaken existing benchmark, E2E, localization or M5 invariant gates

history.details: WM-0140 visual gate found compact main-menu viewport clipping after first-play guidance: assertCompactStartSurfaceLayout reports bottom 730/728 > 721 at compact viewport. Fix requires packages/ui-react, outside WM-0140 allowed paths.
Added WM-0143 to repair compact start-surface clipping before resuming visual evidence gate.
WM-0143 compact start-surface repair is done and pushed; original compact clipping blocker is resolved.

WM-0140 full test:e2e now fails desktop Electron localized-title assertions: English desktop HUD expects zh-CN title text and zh-CN start surface expects Wuming Town. Repair requires apps/desktop-electron/src outside WM-0140 allowed paths; web-shell evidence gate itself passes 13/13.
Added WM-0144 to repair desktop Electron localized-title E2E assertions before resuming the full test:e2e gate.

forbiddenPaths: lowering tests or thresholds to pass
public release or platform verdict changes

blocker.reason: WM-0140 full test:e2e now fails desktop Electron localized-title assertions: English desktop HUD expects zh-CN title text and zh-CN start surface expects Wuming Town. Repair requires apps/desktop-electron/src outside WM-0140 allowed paths; web-shell evidence gate itself passes 13/13.
